meaning: adj.格陵兰[人,语]的n.格陵兰语(一种爱斯基摩语)
examples: 1797 Greenlandic schoolchildren were tested for MTI with an interferon gamma release assay (IGRA).
Greenlandic has become the official language.
But Greenlandic customs are more entertaining.
It may be more like 20 years before Greenlandic oil is produced, assuming it is even found.
